title: Jordan — Visa Application to Enter the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan
description: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Expatriates' (MFA) bilingual (English/Arabic) "Visa Application to Enter the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan" form, distributed as a free download from MFA's own document host. Closes Jordan's Visa vertical (3 of 6), following GOV-2731's Taxes opening (49th jurisdiction) and GOV-2739's Passport vertical. The source is a genuine 2-page print-and-fill specimen — confirmed via pdfjs-dist to carry zero AcroForm/Widget annotations on either page — with a real, fully extractable bilingual text layer; every text item's (x, y) transform was grouped into rows and read in full, and both pages were also rendered to PNG via pdfjs-dist (legacy build) + node-canvas (with the bundled standard-fonts data supplied, since this specimen also relies on non-embedded base fonts) and visually cross-checked against the transcript before modeling any field. The rendered image confirmed a boxed, consular-only "For Official Use" sidebar running the full height of page 1 (submitted-documents checklist, receiving officer, receipt date, amount paid, decision to grant single/double/multiple-entry or refuse, notes) — excluded from this schema's fields, consistent with this registry's established convention for office/consular-use-only sections (e.g. jo/istd/pit-return-employee's "For Official Use" block, jo/cspd/passport-application's page 2). The applicant-facing structure runs: §1 Personal Details (First name; Father's & grandfather's name; Family name; Current nationality; Mother's name; Sex — printed checkboxes Male/Female; Date of Birth; Place of Birth; Marital status — printed checkboxes Single/Married/Divorced/Widow(er); Education; Name of spouse; Spouse's nationality); §2 Passport Details (Type of Passport — printed checkboxes Ordinary passport/Diplomatic passport/Travel document/Other-please specify, with its own free-text "specify" companion; Passport number; Date of issue; Date of expiry; Issuing authority); §3 Contact Details (Applicant's full address; telephone number; email address); §4 Employment (Current occupation; Name and full address of the employing Organisation; an asterisked companion line for School/University if the applicant is a student); §5 Trip Information (Main purpose of visit; Number of Entries — printed checkboxes single Entry/Double Entries/Multiple Entries; Port of entry; Date of arrival; Date of departure; travel-companion name(s), printed as 3 blank ruled lines; a single combined box for either the full address/telephone of the inviting person/organisation in Jordan, or, if a tourist, the hotel/place-of-stay details — both alternatives share one printed blank area); and §6 Additional Information (Do you have any other nationality? with its own "if yes" full-name/passport-number companion lines; Former Nationalities, with its own "if yes" name/passport-number companion lines; Have you ever changed your name? with an "if yes" former-name companion line; Date of first entry into country of residence; Have you been convicted of a criminal offence, or currently on trial? with an "if yes" details line; Have you ever served in the Armed Forces of any country? with an "if yes" details line; Have you ever been expelled from any country? with an "if yes" details line; Countries visited in the last 10 years, printed as 2 blank ruled lines), closing with the form's own certification statement and a combined Name-and-Signature/Date declaration line. This v1.0.0 models 48 applicant-facing fields plus 1 documents[] entry (the certification's own attestation text). This candidate was chosen over a previously-scouted 23-field embassy visa AcroForm because that candidate was only found on third-party visa-expediting mirrors (traveldocument.com, traveldocs.com), not a first-party Jordanian government host (disclosed as an open backlog item in jo/cspd/passport-application's own VERIFICATION.md); this MFA specimen is fetched directly and unauthenticated from mfa.gov.jo, a first-party government domain. The Y/N gate questions in §6 (other nationality, name change, criminal conviction, armed forces service, expulsion) are each modeled as a required boolean field with its own optional "if yes" companion detail field(s), with no requiredWhen coupling between them — matching the same no-invented-gate judgment call this registry's other Jordan schemas made for their own conditional blocks (e.g. jo/cspd/passport-application's Husband/Wife Data and bridge-crossing-card blocks). GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Jordan or the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Expatriates.

authority.name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Expatriates

source.documentRef: Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Expatriates, "Visa Application to Enter the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan"

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2746. Closes Jordan's Visa vertical (3 of 6), following GOV-2731 (Taxes, opened Jordan as the registry's 49th jurisdiction) and GOV-2739 (Passport, confirmed Business Formation/DMV/National ID & Civic Documents as dead ends and left this MFA Visa candidate as an open, well-sourced backlog item after finding a competing 23-field embassy AcroForm only on third-party visa-expediting mirrors, not a first-party government host). This cycle independently re-fetched and re-verified the source from scratch rather than trusting the prior scouting pass's figures verbatim. See this schema's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: The applicant's first name.

fields.name: fatherAndGrandfatherName
fields.label: Father's & grandfather's name
fields.description: The applicant's father's and grandfather's names, printed as one combined blank line (unlike jo/cspd/passport-application's own separate Father/Grandfather lines).

fields.name: familyName
fields.label: Family name
fields.description: The applicant's family name.

fields.name: currentNationality
fields.label: Current nationality
fields.description: The applicant's current nationality. Printed as a blank line with no options text, so modeled as free text rather than an invented enum.

fields.name: mothersName
fields.label: Mother's name
fields.description: The applicant's mother's name.

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sex
fields.description: The applicant's sex, printed as checkboxes.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of Birth
fields.description: The applicant's place of birth.

fields.name: maritalStatus
fields.label: Marital status
fields.description: The applicant's marital status, printed as checkboxes.

fields.name: education
fields.label: Education
fields.description: The applicant's educational attainment. Printed as a blank line with no options text.

fields.name: nameOfSpouse
fields.label: Name of spouse
fields.description: The applicant's spouse's name, if married. The specimen prints no explicit yes/no gate ahead of this field, so it is left optional, consistent with this registry's established precedent for unprinted-gate conditional blocks (e.g. jo/cspd/passport-application's Husband/Wife Data).

fields.name: spouseNationality
fields.label: Spouse's nationality
fields.description: The applicant's spouse's nationality, if married.

fields.name: typeOfPassport
fields.label: Type of Passport
fields.description: The type of passport or travel document the applicant holds, printed as checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, §2 Passport Details, 2.1: "Type Of Passport" — checkboxes "Ordinary passport" / "Diplomatic passport" / "Travel document" / "Other-please specify"

fields.name: typeOfPassportOtherSpecify
fields.label: Type of Passport — Other, please specify
fields.description: Free-text elaboration when "Other" is checked for Type of Passport.

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: Passport number
fields.description: The applicant's passport (or travel document) number.

fields.name: dateOfIssue
fields.label: Date of issue
fields.description: The passport's date of issue.

fields.name: dateOfExpiry
fields.label: Date of expiry
fields.description: The passport's date of expiry.

fields.name: issuingAuthority
fields.label: Issuing authority
fields.description: The authority that issued the passport.

fields.name: applicantFullAddress
fields.label: Applicant's full address
fields.description: The applicant's full address.

fields.name: applicantTelephoneNumber
fields.label: Applicant's telephone number
fields.description: The applicant's telephone number.

fields.name: applicantEmailAddress
fields.label: Applicant's email address
fields.description: The applicant's email address.

fields.name: currentOccupation
fields.label: Current occupation
fields.description: The applicant's current occupation.

fields.name: employerNameAndAddress
fields.label: Name and full address of the employing Organisation
fields.description: The name and full address of the applicant's employing organisation. (The form's own Arabic column additionally lists a telephone number alongside name/address; the English caption prints name and address only.)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, §4 Employment, 4.2: "Name and full address of the employing Organisation"

fields.name: studentSchoolNameAndAddress
fields.label: If Student, name and full address of School/University
fields.description: The name and full address of the applicant's school or university, if the applicant is a student. The specimen prints no explicit yes/no gate ahead of this asterisked companion line, so it is left optional.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, §4 Employment: "* If Student, name and full address of School/ University"

fields.name: mainPurposeOfVisit
fields.label: Main purpose of your visit to Jordan
fields.description: The main purpose of the applicant's visit to Jordan.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §5 Trip Information, 5.1: "Main purpose of your visit to Jordan"

fields.name: numberOfEntries
fields.label: Number of Entries
fields.description: The number of entries requested for this visa, printed as checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §5 Trip Information, 5.2: "Number of Entries" — checkboxes "single Entry" / "Double Entries" / "Multiple Entries"

fields.name: portOfEntry
fields.label: Port of entry to Jordan
fields.description: The applicant's intended port of entry into Jordan.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §5 Trip Information, 5.3: "Port of entry to Jordan"

fields.name: dateOfArrival
fields.label: Date of arrival
fields.description: The applicant's planned date of arrival in Jordan.

fields.name: dateOfDeparture
fields.label: Date of departure
fields.description: The applicant's planned date of departure from Jordan.

fields.name: travelCompanionNames
fields.label: If travelling with someone else, please provide name(s)
fields.description: The name(s) of any travel companion(s), if the applicant is travelling with someone else. Printed as 3 blank ruled lines; modeled as a single free-text field since the source prints no per-companion field structure. The specimen prints no explicit yes/no gate ahead of this line, so it is left optional.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §5 Trip Information, 5.6: "If travelling with someone else, please provide name(s)"

fields.name: invitingPersonOrHotelDetails
fields.label: Full address/telephone number of inviting person/Organisation in Jordan (or hotel details, if a tourist)
fields.description: The full address and telephone number of the person or organisation inviting the applicant to Jordan; or, if the applicant is a tourist, the name of the hotel or place of stay and its telephone number. Both alternatives are printed as captions sharing a single blank writable area, modeled here as one field.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §5 Trip Information, 5.7: "Full address/ telephone number of inviting person/ Organisation in Jordan" / "*If tourist, Name of hotel, place of stay and telephone number"

fields.name: hasOtherNationality
fields.label: Do you have any other nationality?
fields.description: Whether the applicant holds any other nationality besides the one declared at 1.4.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.1: "Do you have any other nationality?"

fields.name: otherNationalityPassportName
fields.label: Other nationality — Full name as written on passport
fields.description: The applicant's full name as written on the other-nationality passport, if the applicant has another nationality.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.1: "If yes. Full name as written on passport"

fields.name: otherNationalityPassportNumber
fields.label: Other nationality — Passport Number
fields.description: The passport number of the applicant's other nationality, if the applicant has another nationality.

fields.name: formerNationalityName
fields.label: Former Nationalities — name as recorded on former passport
fields.description: The name as recorded on the applicant's former passport, if the applicant has held a former nationality. Unlike 6.1/6.3/6.5/6.6/6.7, this section is printed as a plain heading rather than an explicit yes/no question, so no accompanying boolean field is modeled.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.2: "Former Nationalities" — "If Yes, type name as recorded on former passport"

fields.name: formerNationalityPassportNumber
fields.label: Former Nationalities — passport number
fields.description: The passport number of the applicant's former nationality, if the applicant has held a former nationality.

fields.name: hasChangedName
fields.label: Have you ever changed your name?
fields.description: Whether the applicant has ever changed their name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.3: "Have you ever changed your name?"

fields.name: formerName
fields.label: Former name(s)
fields.description: The applicant's former name(s), if the applicant has ever changed their name.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.3: "If yes, former name(s)"

fields.name: dateOfFirstEntryIntoCountryOfResidence
fields.label: Date of first entry into country of residence
fields.description: The date the applicant first entered their country of residence.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.4: "Date of first entry into country of residence"

fields.name: hasCriminalConvictionOrTrial
fields.label: Have you been convicted of a criminal offence, or currently on trial?
fields.description: Whether the applicant has been convicted of a criminal offence, or is currently on trial.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.5: "Have you been convicted of a criminal offence, or currently on trial?"

fields.name: criminalConvictionDetails
fields.label: Criminal conviction/trial — details
fields.description: Details of the applicant's criminal conviction or ongoing trial, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.5: "If yes, provide details"

fields.name: hasServedInArmedForces
fields.label: Have you ever served in the Armed Forces of any country?
fields.description: Whether the applicant has ever served in the armed forces of any country.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.6: "Have you ever served in the Armed Forces of any country?"

fields.name: armedForcesServiceDetails
fields.label: Armed forces service — details
fields.description: Details of the applicant's armed forces service, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.6: "If yes, provide details"

fields.name: hasBeenExpelled
fields.label: Have you ever been expelled from any country?
fields.description: Whether the applicant has ever been expelled from any country.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.7: "Have you ever been expelled from any country?"

fields.name: expulsionDetails
fields.label: Expulsion — details
fields.description: Details of the applicant's expulsion from a country, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.7: "If yes, provide details"

fields.name: countriesVisitedLast10Years
fields.label: Countries visited in the last 10 years
fields.description: The countries the applicant has visited in the last 10 years, printed as 2 blank ruled lines; modeled as a single free-text field since the source prints no per-country field structure.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, §6 Additional Information, 6.8: "Countries visited in the last 10 years"

fields.name: declarantNameAndSignature
fields.label: Name and Signature
fields.description: The applicant's printed name, standing in for their physical signature, attesting to the form's own certification statement.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, closing declaration: "Name and Signature/ Date"

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.description: The date the applicant signed the declaration.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, closing declaration: "Name and Signature/ Date"

documents.label: Applicant's certification
documents.statement: I hereby certify that the above information given is true and correct.
documents.sourceRef: Page 2: "I hereby certify that the above information given is true and correct"
